prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6) engine: HKS GT-SS turbo kit with Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, Tomei 70mm titanium valves, and Tomei Type-S valve springs for 600+ HP on E85 fuel with a custom Haltech Elite 2500 ECU tune
HKS Hi-Power exhaust system with 3.5-inch titanium piping, HKS Racing Suction Reloaded intake, and Tomei 4-2-1 stainless steel headers with equal-length primaries for optimized scavenging

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 8/16-way adjustable damping, Cusco 22mm front sway bar, Cusco 18mm rear sway bar, and SuperPro poly bushings for chassis rigidity, paired with Endless CC-RS brake pads and DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser for aggressive stance and aero efficiency

Voltex Type-7 rear wing with carbon fiber construction and adjustable angle for 150+ lbs of downforce at 120 mph, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood featuring a functional NACA duct for VQ37VHR intercooler cooling

Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +25 front and 19x12 +30 rear wheels with Toyo R888R tires, wrapped in custom matte gunmetal paint with gold accents, and Origin Labs extended wheel studs for track-ready fitment
